ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Build Sales Strategy.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( NOT( OR(RecordType.Name = "EM Sales Opportunity" || RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity" || RecordType.Name = "Free-Standing ED Opportunity" || RecordType.Name = "HM Sales Opportunity")) && (ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Build Sales Strategy")&& TEXT(Bid_Process__c)= ""),true,false )
